description:
Install any app on Samsung Tizen devices вЂ” TVs, projectors and smart monitors

Cross-platform desktop installer that side-loads any app onto Samsung Smart TVs, projectors and smart monitors running Tizen OS вЂ” Jellyfin, Moonlight, Moonfin, Litefin and a community catalog, or your own WGT package. Handles device discovery, Tizen certificates and installation. Successor to Jellyfin2Samsung.Jellyfin2Samsung.
рџ“¦ v2.5.7 вЂ” 2026-07-02
рџ©№ Stable release v2.5.7
Focused on install reliability, network handling, and legacy Windows support.
вњЁ New
- VPN / tunnel warning on the main screen when a VPN, proxy, or "secure DNS" adapter is active вЂ” a common reason a TV isn't found or an install fails.
- Smarter network scan that skips VPN/tunnel and reserved IP ranges: faster, and no more chasing phantom devices or sending the install through a tunnel.
рџ”Ђ Fixes
- Windows 7 downloads: request a modern secure (TLS) connection and tolerate older certificate stores so downloads work on legacy Windows. Best-effort вЂ” TLS 1.2 must be enabled in Windows itself. (#415)
- Clearer install errors: a dropped connection ("connection reset by peer") now shows a helpful hint instead of silently retrying, and failures report the real underlying cause.
- Corrupt download recovery: the package is validated and re-downloaded if a previous attempt left it incomplete (fixes "End of Central Directory record could not be found").
- Settings window no longer clips its bottom row, and scrollbars stay visible.
- Main window resizes correctly so nothing gets cut off.
в¬†пёЏ Updating
From v2.5.5+: auto-update works
Full Changelog: v2.5.6...v2.5.7
